ocr_findings.description: Image shows a diagram of 'ビットとバイト' (1ビット = 0か1が入る; 1バイト = 8ビット) at top; OCR references as '[img-0.jpeg]' with no text extracted — the label text '1ビット', '0か1が入る', '1バイト', '8ビット' are not captured but these are diagram annotations, not main body text.
Table of data units (テラ/ギガ/メガ/キロ etc.) is correctly structured in OCR with 4 columns (単位, 記号, 10進数表記, 累乗). Column alignment matches image. No rows lost.

reviewer_notes: Page covers data units (テラ through ピコ) with a well-formed table and explanatory paragraphs about gigabytes and kilo conventions. The table is faithfully reproduced with correct rows and columns. The bit/byte diagram at top is referenced as an image placeholder — diagram label text not extracted but this is cosmetic given the table and body text capture all essential information.
